artifact.content_preview:
From: j.henderson@techsupplier.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: bob.morrison@ssc-spc.gc.ca; ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update
Date: Mon, 2 Mar 2026 09:14:32 -0500

Alice,

Following our call on Friday, I wanted to confirm in writing the situation
with the Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches for the NGIS Phase 3 data centre
migration.

Unfortunately, our primary distribution centre experienced a warehouse
management system failure that has affected ou

extracted_tasks.text: please confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: please confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst

metadata.subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update

risks.description: Vendor delivery delayed 2 weeks, threatening NGIS Phase 3 migration window opening March 8

evidence_refs.excerpt: confirmed a 2-week delay on the network equipment originally scheduled to arrive at your Gatineau facility on March 6

risks.description: Vendor single-sourced through Montreal warehouse, no viable alternative without further 3–5 day delay

evidence_refs.excerpt: we are currently single-sourced on this product line through our Montreal warehouse

risks.description: Alternative routing via Vancouver depot adds 'further 3–5 business days', worsening schedule risk

evidence_refs.excerpt: alternative routing via our Vancouver depot would add a further 3–5 business days

risks.description: Equipment staging and testing window lost — equipment needed March 6, now arriving March 20

evidence_refs.excerpt: we need the equipment on site no later than March 6 for staging and testing

risks.description: Vendor warehouse system failure ongoing since February 26, root cause unresolved, recurrence risk remains

evidence_refs.excerpt: warehouse management system failure that has affected outbound shipments since February 26
